agent.action_blocked: tool action needs a clearer policy. shell.exec is disabled by default unless enabled in config.
memory.not_found: I did not find any matching memory.
channel.empty_prompt: you called me, but what should I do?
channel.empty_agent_reply: I do not have anything to reply with yet.
provider.mock.default: I am VietClaw, a lightweight agent runtime for routing models, memory, and tools.
provider.mock.memory: mock here: I can save and search memory through SQLite.
agent.max_steps_reached: The maximum execution step count was reached without a final response.
tool.file_read: Read a file inside the workspace and return its full content.
tool.file_write: Write new content to a file inside the workspace. Parent directories are created when missing.
tool.shell_exec: Run a system shell command and return combined stdout and stderr output.
tool.param.content: Content to write into the file.
tool.web_search: Search the web (DuckDuckGo / open-websearch). REQUIRED before web_fetch when you need live internet facts. Never guess URLs or domain names.
tool.web_fetch: Fetch plain text from a URL. ONLY use URLs from web_search results or provided by the user — do not invent domains.
system.web_research_guide: Web research workflow: (1) web_search with a focused query; (2) pick URLs from results; (3) web_fetch trusted URLs only. If search is empty, reformulate the query — do not fetch guessed URLs. Stop after 3 consecutive fetch failures and tell the user.
system.prompt_base: You are %s, a lightweight orchestration agent. Reply in concise, natural English.
system.summarize_prompt:
Summarize the key points and flow of the conversation below in concise English for AI context. Return only the summary text, no preamble or formatting:

%s
system.agents_auto_create_enabled: You may create new agents via the agent_create tool.
system.agents_auto_create_guide: For agent_create: write a DETAILED AGENT.md body in English or Vietnamese (persona ≥400 chars, ≥3 ## sections). Template (either language): ## Role; ## Responsibilities; ## Workflow; ## Output format; ## Tool rules; ## Limits; ## Examples. Set language: vi or en in frontmatter. Require skills[] and tool_guides[] in the same language. Never create 1-4 line stub agents.
system.agents_auto_create_disabled: You must NOT create new agents (agent_create is disabled). Do not write AGENT.md manually — tell the user to enable allow_auto_create in settings.
system.agents_no_spawnable: No spawnable agents are available. Do not call agent_spawn/agent_delegate for agents that do not exist.
system.agents_spawn_rules: When spawning: agent_id must match task specialty. VPS/pricing research → prefer vps-researcher. Always web_search before web_fetch. Use agent_spawn_batch with separate tasks.
